name: Seattle Children's Hospital
description: Leading pediatric hospital in Seattle, Washington. Operates 388 beds with $3.5B annual revenue. Ten-year managed cloud agreement announced February 2025 covering Epic EHR infrastructure with 99.999% uptime SLA. com/case-studies/seattle-childrens.

provenance.primary_data_source: Rackspace IR press release February 2025; Stage 2.4 Customer Segments; Stage 3.3 Customer Lock-in
provenance.assessed_by: Thomas Jones | AI Enrichment Agent (Claude) — DD Corroboration Pass

name: J.Crew
description: American multi-brand apparel retailer headquartered in New York. Built custom AWS-native AI bots to streamline workload operations. com/case-studies/jcrew, featured January 2025.

name: Domino's Pizza UK & Ireland Ltd
description: Master franchisee for Domino's Pizza brand across the United Kingdom and Republic of Ireland. Expanded store network and scaled operations during peak demand using hybrid cloud infrastructure. com/case-studies/dominos-pizza-uk-ireland-ltd.

name: Domino's Pizza Enterprises Limited
description: ASX-listed (ASX:DMP) master franchisee headquartered in Brisbane, Australia. Largest Domino's franchisee outside the United States operating 2,000+ stores across three continents. com/customer-stories/dominos-pizza-enterprises-limited-dmp.

name: American Logistics
description: Healthcare transportation services provider specializing in non-emergency medical transport. Improved operations and scaled for growth through cloud migration. com/case-studies/american-logistics.

name: AngelTrack
description: Emergency medical services software provider delivering cloud-based EMS dispatch and billing solutions. Cut technical debt by 50% and boosted performance by 34%. com/case-studies/angeltrack.

name: JobTarget
description: Leading job search and recruitment platform serving Fortune 1000 companies, recruitment agencies and small businesses. Business grew 100% in 2021 and doubled again in 2022. com/case-studies/jobtarget and GlobeNewswire press release February 2023.

name: BMG
description: Global music company headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Fourth-largest music publisher worldwide representing over three million songs and recordings. com/case-studies/bmg-google-cloud.

name: Humber College
description: Public college of applied arts and technology in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Migrated to AWS for remote learning and ERP workloads. com/case-studies/humber-college and rackspace.com/case-studies/humber-college-onica.

name: Central and North West London NHS Foundation Trust
description: NHS Foundation Trust providing mental health, community health and specialist services across central and northwest London, Milton Keynes and surrounding areas. Migrated to VMware private cloud. com/case-studies/cnwl.

name: Moody's Analytics
description: Global integrated risk assessment firm and subsidiary of Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO). Provides financial intelligence and analytical tools to financial services organizations worldwide. com/case-studies/moodys-analytics.

name: CDG
description: Caisse de Dépôt et de Gestion, Moroccan state-owned financial institution managing long-term savings and financing economic development. Reduced cloud migration project timeline from 18 months to 6 months. com/case-studies/cdg.

name: Sentrics
description: Technology company headquartered in Garland, Texas providing integrated technology solutions for senior living communities including the Engage360 platform. com/case-studies/sentrics and GlobeNewswire press release March 2021.

name: GitLab
description: DevOps platform company (NASDAQ:GTLB) providing a complete DevOps lifecycle tool delivered as a single application. com/case-studies/gitlab.

name: MovieTickets.com
description: Online movie ticketing platform providing advance ticket purchasing for theaters across North America. com/case-studies/movieticketscom.

name: Delmar International Inc
description: Canadian customs brokerage and international freight forwarding company providing logistics services across North America. com/case-studies/delmar-international-inc.

name: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts
description: Global hotel franchising company (NYSE:WH) operating approximately 9,100 hotels across 95 countries. World's largest hotel franchisor by number of properties. Engaged for colocation services post-spinoff from Wyndham Worldwide. com/case-studies/wyndham-hotels-resorts.

name: Ulta Beauty
description: Largest beauty retailer in the United States (NASDAQ:ULTA) operating 1,385+ stores and ulta.com. com/case-studies/ulta.

name: CAS
description: Division of the American Chemical Society headquartered in Columbus, Ohio. Connects the world's scientific knowledge to accelerate breakthroughs through chemistry and life science databases. Customer relationship spanning 10+ years. com/case-studies/cas.

name: TrueData
description: AdTech data company providing identity resolution and audience targeting solutions for digital advertising. Achieved 66% cost savings through cloud optimization. com/case-studies/truedata.

name: Live Nation Entertainment
description: World's largest live entertainment company (NYSE:LYV) producing over 40,000 shows and 100+ festivals annually across 46 countries. com/case-studies/live-nation.

name: Coinstar
description: Operator of self-service coin-counting kiosks and eGift card exchange services with over 20,000 locations across the United States. com/case-studies/coinstar.

name: Niterra Co., Ltd.
description: Japanese automotive components manufacturer formerly known as NGK Spark Plug Co., Ltd. (TSE:5334). Headquartered in Nagoya, Japan with global operations. Rebranded to Niterra in 2023. com/case-studies/niterra and Rackspace press release December 2025.

name: Basware
description: Finnish financial technology company providing cloud-based accounts payable automation and procurement solutions serving over 9,000 businesses globally. com/case-studies/basware.

name: Be A Part Of
description: Canada-based ecommerce and digital solutions company specializing as a certified BigCommerce partner. Merged with Zmags in 2022 to scale ecommerce brands through the Creator platform. com/case-studies/be-a-part-of.

name: Comply Exchange
description: FinTech company providing tax compliance automation solutions for withholding tax, FATCA, and CRS reporting requirements. com/case-studies/comply-exchange.

name: Rena Ware International
description: Direct seller of eco-friendly household goods specializing in global distribution of cookware, kitchenware and water filtration systems across seven regional markets. Achieved 40% reduction in monthly operational expenses through platform consolidation. com/case-studies/rena-ware.

name: inPhronesis
description: Biomedical software company providing proprietary data insights to eight of the top 20 global pharmaceutical companies through the inVision platform. com/case-studies/inphronesis and Rackspace press release April 2023.

name: GLP
description: Global investment manager and business builder in logistics, real estate, infrastructure, finance and related technologies. Headquartered in Singapore with operations across 17 countries. com/case-studies/glp.

name: Munster Technological University
description: Technological university in Munster, Ireland formed in 2021. Received €600,000 in EOSC funding for AWS-based quantum computing research. com/case-studies/munster-technological-university.

name: University of Galway
description: Public research university in Galway, Ireland founded in 1845. Member of the OCRE framework for European research cloud procurement. com/case-studies/university-galway.

name: Plus500
description: Global multi-asset fintech group (LSE:PLUS) providing online trading platforms. Relationship spanning 10+ years. Headquartered in Haifa, Israel with operations in the UK, EU, Australia and other markets. com/case-studies/plus500.

name: TOI TOI & DIXI Group GmbH
description: German-based company providing mobile sanitation and container solutions across Europe. One of the largest providers of portable toilets and sanitation services in the world. com/case-studies/toi-toi-dixi.

name: McGraw Hill
description: American educational publishing and digital learning company providing adaptive learning technology, textbooks and assessment solutions to students worldwide. com/case-studies/mcgraw-hill.

name: Braze
description: Customer engagement platform (NASDAQ:BRZE) providing cross-channel messaging and analytics for marketing automation. Headquartered in New York. com/case-studies/braze.

name: Spireon
description: Connected vehicle intelligence company providing IoT fleet management and asset tracking solutions for automotive dealers, lenders and fleet operators across North America. com/case-studies/spireon.

name: Aeroméxico
description: Mexico's flagship airline (BMV:AEROMEX) operating since 1934 with 80+ years of history. Member of SkyTeam alliance serving destinations across the Americas, Europe and Asia. Tripled online sales and achieved 40% increase in mobile penetration. com/customer-stories/aeromexico.

name: Mrs. T's Pierogies
description: American frozen food manufacturer and largest producer of pierogies in the United States. Subsidiary of Ateeco, Inc. headquartered in Shenandoah, Pennsylvania. com/case-studies/mrs-ts-pierogies.

name: Total Wine & More
description: Largest independent retailer of fine wine and spirits in the United States operating 284 superstores across 29 states. Privately held, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland.

name: Rackspace Email Hosting Customer Segment
description: Aggregate customer segment representing tens of thousands of business domains using Rackspace Email hosted email service. Identified via OSINT through reverse MX record analysis showing domains resolving to mx1.emailsrvr.com and mx2.emailsrvr.com. Primarily SMB and mid-market organizations. Served from Rackspace-owned data centers on AS33070 (DFW) and AS27357 (IAD) infrastructure. com MX record analysis, ipinfo.io ASN domain enumeration, Rackspace Email product page.
